title: Find files larger than 100 MB recursively
description: Recursively finds all regular files larger than 100 MB under the current directory.
explanation: The command traverses directories recursively, filters regular files using -type f, and selects files larger than 100 MB using -size +100M.
author: Tiririca da Silva

arguments.name: PATH
arguments.description: Starting directory for the recursive search.

examples.description: Find large files in current directory

notes: Size units depend on system implementation
warnings: May be slow on large directory trees
